$note: Captured snapshot of the COMPARED forecast/intelligence product for the azimuth benchmark (synthesis/benchmark.py). Quoted by product + capture date; NOT surfaced as an azimuth channel and NOT an L1 source. Refresh with pull_benchmark_foils.py.

foil.title: Energy repricing risk from Israel/Gaza security escalation state
foil.scenario_short: Israel/Gaza security escalation state, with 52% pressure and 70% state confirmation, will feed energy repricing through energy supply shock over the next 30 days, driven by 10 urgent critical signals and headlines of...
foil.perspective_strategic: The 52% pressure and 70% state confirmation indicate a moderate but active energy supply shock transmission path, with 10 urgent critical signals reinforcing the current stable baseline.
foil.perspective_contrarian: The 75% confidence level leaves room for reversal, and the trigger for more directly matched reporting has not yet been met, suggesting the path could stall if no new hard signals emerge.
foil.actor_lens: Commodity traders: Price whether stress in Israel/Gaza becomes durable over the 30d. Rebalance positions if the probability path moves away from 59%.
foil.top_signal: Israel/Gaza security escalation state is feeding energy repricing through energy supply shock, with 52% pressure and 70% state confirmation

foil.title: Inflation and rates pressure from Cuba infrastructure fragility state
foil.scenario_short: Cuba infrastructure fragility state is feeding inflation and rates pressure through energy supply shock, with 47% pressure and 62% state confirmation. For now, the base case stays near 66% over the 30d. Actors absorb...
foil.perspective_strategic: Cuba infrastructure fragility state is feeding inflation and rates pressure through energy supply shock, with 47% pressure and 62% state confirmation is setting the strategic baseline, and the current 64% probability implies a live but not settled risk path.
foil.perspective_contrarian: No directly matched headlines are currently attached to Cuba. If that restraint persists, the forecast can move below the current 64% baseline. Actors prioritize containment and the system drifts toward stabilization unless new hard signals emerge.
foil.actor_lens: Commodity traders: Price whether stress in Cuba becomes durable over the 30d. Rebalance positions if the probability path moves away from 64%.
foil.top_signal: Cuba infrastructure fragility state is feeding inflation and rates pressure through energy supply shock, with 47% pressure and 62% state confirmation

seismic-infrastructure.absence_reason: No product publishes a seismic forecast — earthquakes are not predictable, so there is no forecast/intel alternative to azimuth's observed USGS record. This is the honest inverse: for an observed natural-hazard fact, the sourced record IS the only trustworthy source.
